case_title: CHINH HUYNH et al VS. ALAN W TING et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-25-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
